utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format includes 7 items: destination, travel_dates, transportation, accommodation, activities, additional_services, and total_budget. The final package contains all seven items. Each item is fully specified: (1) destination is clearly stated (Lisbon, Portugal); (2) travel_dates are specific (October 10–14, 2024); (3) transportation includes flight details with cost (€150), airline, airports, class, baggage, and cancellation info; (4) accommodation includes hotel name, type, location, star rating, nightly price, total cost, amenities, and cancellation policy; (5) activities include name, type, duration, cost, and inclusions; (6) additional_services include restaurant name, cuisine, cost, and reservation detail; (7) total_budget includes overall cost, budget limit, and remaining budget. All items are complete and detailed.
